title: hordeum murinum subsp. leporinum
intro: Hordeum murinum subsp. leporinum, also known as barley grass, is a type of wild grass that belongs to the Hordeum genus. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hordeum murinum subsp. leporinum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of barley grass include teas, capsules, and powders, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
